nasb.text: For thus says the Lord, ‘Just as I brought all this great disaster on this people, so I am going to bring on them all the good that I am promising them.

esv.text: “For thus says the Lord: Just as I have brought all this great disaster upon this people, so I will bring upon them all the good that I promise them.

cnv.text: “因為耶和華這樣說：‘我怎樣使這一切大災禍臨到這人民，我也必照樣使我應許他們的福樂臨到他們。

ccb.text: “‘我曾降下这一切灾祸给他们，我也要把我应许的福乐赐给他们。这是耶和华说的。
